info.title: DVLP-KSeF-PP-Connector
info.description:
/PL/: Konektor Developico do KSeF API — zarządzanie fakturami, synchronizacja z KSeF, dashboard, wyszukiwanie w rejestrze VAT (Biała Lista).
/EN/: Developico Connector for the KSeF API — invoice management, synchronization with KSeF, dashboard, VAT White List (Biała Lista) lookup.

get.description: Returns basic system health status. For detailed health including service connectivity and response times, use GET /health/detailed.

parameters.name: environment
parameters.description: KSeF environment to check (domyślnie z konfiguracji)

parameters.name: settingId
parameters.description: ID ustawienia firmy (UUID) — filtruje faktury po firmie

delete.description: Permanently delete an invoice by ID.

patch.description: Partially update an existing invoice. All fields are optional.

get.description: Returns all notes attached to an invoice.

post.description: Add a text note to an invoice for internal comments or audit trail.
Create a new invoice manually (not synced from KSeF).

get.description: Returns invoice statistics for the selected company and period.
/PL/: Ostatnia aktywność — faktury, akceptacje, samofakturowanie, synchronizacja. /EN/: Recent activity feed — invoices, approvals, self-billing, sync.

post.description: **DEPRECATED** — use POST /ksef/sync instead. Legacy synchronization endpoint. Will be removed in a future version. For new integrations and Copilot Studio agents, use StartKsefSync.

get.description: Returns history of synchronization logs.

post.description: Synchronize incoming invoices from KSeF for a given company (by NIP). Uses the native KSeF session-based sync. Imports invoices found in the specified date range directly from KSeF API.

importAll.description: Importuj wszystkie znalezione faktury bez potwierdzenia (domyślnie true)

get.description: Detect unusual invoice patterns: amount spikes, new suppliers, duplicate suspects, category shifts, and frequency changes.

parameters.name: sensitivity
parameters.description: Próg czułości detekcji — mnożnik odchylenia standardowego (domyślnie 2.0, zakres 1–5)

parameters.name: enabledRules
parameters.description: Lista aktywnych reguł oddzielona przecinkami (amount-spike, new-supplier, duplicate-suspect, category-shift, frequency-change)

get.description: Returns anomaly counts grouped by type and severity for the selected period.
Returns available anomaly detection rules with their parameter descriptors and preset configurations.
Returns list of company settings (KSeF configurations).
Returns a lightweight list of companies registered in Dataverse — company name, NIP, environment, and setting ID. Useful for dropdowns and selectors.
Returns NBP exchange rate for a given currency and date.

post.description: Extracts structured invoice data from an uploaded document (PDF or image) using AI (OCR/Vision). Returns supplier info, amounts, line items, and suggested MPK/category classification.

mimeType.description: Typ MIME dokumentu (application/pdf, image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp, image/tiff)

content.description: Zawartość pliku zakodowana w Base64 (max ~10 MB)

200.description: Extraction result with structured invoice data

400.description: Invalid request or file too large

post.description: Use AI to suggest MPK and category for an invoice.

supplierName.description: Nazwa dostawcy (opcjonalnie nadpisuje dane z faktury)

supplierNip.description: NIP dostawcy (opcjonalnie nadpisuje dane z faktury)

grossAmount.description: Kwota brutto (opcjonalnie nadpisuje dane z faktury)

post.description: Use AI to suggest MPK and category for multiple invoices in one call. Processes all specified invoices and saves AI suggestions to Dataverse. If autoApply is enabled, also writes AI results to the actual invoice fields.

autoApply.description: Automatycznie zastosuj wyniki AI do pól faktury mpk/category/description (domyślnie false)

post.description: Search for a subject in the White List of VAT Taxpayers (Biała Lista Podatników VAT) by NIP or REGON. Returns company details, VAT status, registered bank accounts.

get.description: Offline NIP validation (checksum algorithm only, no API call). Returns whether the NIP number has a valid checksum.

post.summary: Check Bank Account in VAT White List
post.description: Verify whether a bank account number is registered for a given NIP in the White List of VAT Taxpayers.

get.description: Returns available KSeF environments (test, demo, production) with their base URLs, descriptions, and available permissions.

post.description: Generate realistic test invoices in Dataverse for a given company. Only allowed for test and demo environments.

companyId.description: ID ustawienia firmy (UUID, opcjonalny — fallback na NIP)

ksefPercentage.description: Procent faktur ze źródłem KSeF vs Manual (0–100)

get.description: Returns historical monthly expense data and AI-generated forecast for future months using statistical methods (moving average, linear regression, seasonal adjustment).

parameters.name: horizon
parameters.description: Number of months to forecast (1, 6, or 12; default 6)

parameters.name: historyMonths
parameters.description: Months of historical data to use (3–60, default 24)

get.description: Returns expense forecast grouped by cost center (MPK). Groups are sorted by total forecast amount descending.

parameters.name: horizon
parameters.description: Number of months to forecast (1, 6, or 12; default 6)

parameters.name: historyMonths
parameters.description: Months of historical data to use (3–60, default 24)

get.description: Returns expense forecast grouped by expense category. Groups are sorted by total forecast amount descending.

parameters.name: horizon
parameters.description: Number of months to forecast (1, 6, or 12; default 6)

parameters.name: historyMonths
parameters.description: Months of historical data to use (3–60, default 24)

get.description: Returns expense forecast for top-N suppliers by gross amount. Groups are sorted by total forecast amount descending.

parameters.name: horizon
parameters.description: Number of months to forecast (1, 6, or 12; default 6)

parameters.name: historyMonths
parameters.description: Months of historical data to use (3–60, default 24)

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Number of top suppliers to include (max 20, default 10)

get.description: Returns available forecast algorithms with their parameter metadata and preset configurations.
Returns the current KSeF connection status and token information.
Returns the current active KSeF session, if any.

delete.description: Terminates the current active KSeF session.

post.description: Starts a new interactive session with KSeF.

get.description: Returns a preview of invoices available for import from KSeF.

post.description: Imports selected invoices from KSeF based on reference numbers.

get.description: Returns all attachments for a given invoice.

post.description: Upload a file attachment to an invoice (PDF, image, etc.). Content must be Base64-encoded.

get.description: Returns the Base64-encoded content of an attachment.

delete.description: Permanently delete an attachment by ID.

get.description: Returns allowed file types, max size, and other attachment constraints.
Returns detailed system health status including Dataverse connectivity, Key Vault access, KSeF service availability, and response times.
Returns MPK cost centers for a given company setting.

post.description: Creates a new MPK cost center. Requires Admin role.

get.description: Returns a single MPK center by ID.

delete.description: Soft-deletes an MPK center (sets isActive to false). Requires Admin role.

patch.description: Updates an existing MPK center. Requires Admin role.

get.description: Returns the list of approvers assigned to an MPK center.

put.description: Full-replace the approvers list for an MPK center. Requires Admin role.

get.description: Returns active Dataverse system users for approver assignment. Requires Admin role.

post.description: Approve a pending invoice. User must be an authorized approver for the invoice's MPK center, or have Admin role (D2 fallback).

400.description: Invoice is not in Pending status or has no MPK

403.description: Forbidden — user is not an authorized approver

post.description: Reject a pending invoice. Comment is required. User must be an authorized approver for the invoice's MPK center.

400.description: Invoice is not in Pending status, no MPK, or missing comment

403.description: Forbidden — user is not an authorized approver

post.description: Cancel a pending approval. Only Admin role can cancel (D16). Transitions from Pending → Cancelled.

400.description: Invoice is not in Pending status

post.description: Refresh the approvers for an invoice's MPK center (D20). Returns the current number of approvers.

403.description: Forbidden — user is not authorized for this MPK

post.description: Approve multiple pending invoices at once (D17). Processes each invoice independently — partial success is possible.

invoiceIds.description: Array of invoice UUIDs to approve

comment.description: Optional approval comment applied to all invoices

403.description: Forbidden — requires Reader role or higher

get.description: List invoices pending approval for the current user. Admin sees all pending invoices; non-Admin sees only invoices for MPK centers where they are an assigned approver.

parameters.name: settingId
parameters.description: Setting/company UUID to scope the query

post.description: /PL/: Zastosuj workflow akceptacji do faktur w centrum MPK. /EN/: Apply approval workflow to invoices in this MPK center.
/PL/: Cofnij workflow akceptacji z faktur w centrum MPK. /EN/: Revoke approval workflow from invoices in this MPK center.

get.description: Get budget utilization status for a specific MPK center. Returns current period utilization, remaining budget, and warning flags. Returns null data if no budget is configured for the MPK.

200.description: Budget status (or null if no budget configured)

get.description: Get budget utilization summary for all MPK centers with budget configured in a given setting. Returns only MPKs that have budgetAmount, budgetPeriod, and budgetStartDate set.

parameters.name: settingId
parameters.description: Setting/company UUID to scope the query

200.description: Budget summary for all configured MPKs

get.description: List in-app notifications for the current user. Supports unreadOnly and top filters. The user is resolved from the Bearer token OID.

parameters.name: settingId
parameters.description: Setting/company UUID to scope the query

parameters.name: unreadOnly
parameters.description: If true, return only unread notifications

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Maximum number of notifications to return (default 50)

patch.description: Marks a single notification as read.

post.description: Dismisses (soft-deletes) a notification so it no longer appears.
/PL/: Oznacza wszystkie powiadomienia bieżącego użytkownika jako przeczytane. /EN/: Mark all notifications for the current user as read.

get.description: Returns the count of unread notifications for the current user. Useful for notification badge display.

parameters.name: settingId
parameters.description: Setting/company UUID to scope the query

get.description: Generates a budget utilization report across all MPK centers (or a single MPK) for the current budget period. Includes totals rollup.

parameters.name: mpkCenterId
parameters.description: Optional MPK center UUID to narrow the report

get.description: Returns approval history for invoices that have been through the workflow (non-Draft). Supports date range, MPK, and status filters.
Returns approver performance metrics — response times, approval rates, and workload distribution.
Returns invoice processing statistics — volumes, average processing time, status distribution over time.
/PL/: Lista dostawców z filtrowaniem. Wymagany parametr settingId. /EN/: List suppliers with filters. settingId query parameter is required.

parameters.name: hasSelfBillingAgreement
parameters.description: Filter suppliers with active self-billing agreement

post.description: /PL/: Tworzy nowego dostawcę. NIP musi mieć poprawną sumę kontrolną. /EN/: Create a new supplier. NIP must have a valid checksum.

409.description: Supplier with this NIP already exists

get.description: /PL/: Statystyki dostawcy — liczba faktur, kwoty, zaległości. /EN/: Supplier statistics — invoice count, amounts, overdue payments.

post.description: Force recalculation of cached supplier statistics.

get.description: List invoices for a specific supplier.

post.description: /PL/: Odświeża dane dostawcy z rejestru VAT (Biała Lista). /EN/: Refresh supplier data from VAT White List.
/PL/: Tworzy dostawcę na podstawie danych z rejestru VAT. Podaj NIP i settingId. /EN/: Create a supplier using VAT White List data. Provide NIP and settingId.

409.description: Supplier with this NIP already exists

post.description: Scans all KSeF invoices for the setting, extracts unique seller NIPs, and creates Supplier records for those not already existing.

get.description: Returns all attachments for a supplier.

post.description: Uploads a base64-encoded file attachment to a supplier.

get.description: Returns all notes for a supplier.

post.description: Creates a note on a supplier record.
Imports suppliers from CSV or Excel file. Returns a preview with validation results for confirmation.
Confirms and executes the supplier import based on previously validated rows.

get.description: Downloads a blank CSV or Excel template for supplier import.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: Template format (csv or xlsx, default csv)

get.description: /PL/: Lista umów samofakturowania. Wymagany parametr settingId. /EN/: List self-billing agreements. settingId is required.

post.description: /PL/: Tworzy nową umowę samofakturowania. Dostawca musi istnieć i być aktywny. /EN/: Create a new self-billing agreement. Supplier must exist and be active.
/PL/: Rozwiązuje umowę samofakturowania. Status zmienia się na Terminated. /EN/: Terminate the agreement. Status changes to Terminated.
Upload a document (e.g., signed agreement PDF) to an agreement.

400.description: No file provided or file too large

get.description: /PL/: Lista szablonów pozycji samofakturowania. Wymagany parametr settingId. /EN/: List self-billing invoice item templates. settingId is required.

post.description: /PL/: Duplikuje szablon dla innego dostawcy. /EN/: Duplicate a template for another supplier.

get.description: /PL/: Lista faktur samofakturowania. Wymagany parametr settingId. /EN/: List self-billing invoices with filtering. settingId is required.

post.description: /PL/: Tworzy nową fakturę samofakturowania. Wymagane agreementId lub supplierId. /EN/: Create a self-billing invoice. Either agreementId or supplierId is required.
/PL/: Podgląd generowanej faktury bez zapisywania. /EN/: Preview a generated invoice without saving.

/PL/: Generuje faktury samofakturowania na podstawie szablonów dla wybranego okresu. Zwraca podgląd (preview) do potwierdzenia. /EN/: Generate self-billing invoices from templates for a given period. Returns a preview for confirmation.
/PL/: Zatwierdza wygenerowane faktury i zapisuje je w Dataverse. /EN/: Confirm and save generated invoices to Dataverse.
/PL/: Tworzenie wielu faktur samofakturowania jednocześnie (max 100). /EN/: Create multiple self-billing invoices at once (max 100).

post.summary: Submit Self-Billing Invoice for Seller Review
post.description: /PL/: Wysyła fakturę do akceptacji sprzedawcy. Status: Draft → PendingSeller. /EN/: Submit invoice for seller review. Status: Draft → PendingSeller.
/PL/: Sprzedawca akceptuje fakturę. Status: PendingSeller → SellerApproved. /EN/: Seller approves the invoice. Status: PendingSeller → SellerApproved.
/PL/: Sprzedawca odrzuca fakturę. Status: PendingSeller → SellerRejected. /EN/: Seller rejects the invoice. Status: PendingSeller → SellerRejected.
/PL/: Wysyła zaakceptowaną fakturę do KSeF. Status: SellerApproved → SentToKsef. /EN/: Send approved invoice to KSeF. Status: SellerApproved → SentToKsef.

get.description: Returns a single self-billing invoice by ID.

delete.description: Deletes a self-billing invoice. Only Draft or SellerRejected invoices can be deleted.

400.description: Invoice status does not allow deletion

patch.description: Updates a draft self-billing invoice. Only invoices with Draft status can be modified.

items.description: Line items (replaces all existing items, min 1)

400.description: Invoice is not in Draft status or invalid body

post.description: Reverts a self-billing invoice back to Draft status. Cannot revert Draft or SentToKsef invoices.

get.description: Returns all notes for a self-billing invoice.

post.description: Creates a note on a self-billing invoice.
/PL/: Import faktur z pliku CSV lub Excel. Zwraca podgląd do potwierdzenia. /EN/: Import invoices from CSV or Excel file. Returns preview for confirmation.
/PL/: Zatwierdza zaimportowane faktury i zapisuje je w Dataverse. /EN/: Confirm and save imported invoices.

importId.description: Import session ID returned from import preview

get.description: /PL/: Pobierz szablon pliku CSV do importu faktur samofakturowania. /EN/: Download CSV template for self-billing invoice import.

post.description: Submits multiple draft invoices for seller approval. Invoices with auto-approve agreements move directly to SellerApproved.
Approves multiple PendingSeller invoices (seller approval).
Rejects multiple PendingSeller invoices with a reason.
Sends multiple SellerApproved invoices to KSeF.
Deletes multiple Draft or SellerRejected invoices.

get.description: Returns self-billing invoices pending seller approval. Non-admin users only see invoices for suppliers where they are the contact.

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: Set to "true" to show all pending invoices (Admin only)

post.description: Deactivates multiple suppliers in bulk.
Reactivates multiple suppliers in bulk.
Mark multiple invoices as paid in bulk.
Revert payment status of multiple invoices in bulk.
Approve multiple invoices in bulk.
Reject multiple invoices in bulk with a comment.
Delete multiple invoices in bulk.
/PL/: Testuje połączenie tokena KSeF — sprawdza Key Vault i dostęp do API. /EN/: Test KSeF token connectivity — checks Key Vault and KSeF API access.

get.description: /PL/: Przegląd zatwierdzających z Entra ID z danymi o przypisanych centrach MPK. /EN/: Overview of approvers from Entra ID with assigned MPK center data.
/PL/: Lista dokumentów kosztowych z filtrowaniem i paginacją. /EN/: List cost documents with filtering and pagination.

post.description: /PL/: Utwórz nowy dokument kosztowy. /EN/: Create a new cost document.

get.description: /PL/: Podsumowanie dokumentów kosztowych — liczby i kwoty wg typu i statusu. /EN/: Cost documents dashboard summary — counts and amounts by type and status.
/PL/: Pobierz pojedynczy dokument kosztowy po ID. /EN/: Get a single cost document by ID.

delete.description: /PL/: Usuń dokument kosztowy. /EN/: Delete a cost document.

patch.description: /PL/: Aktualizuj dokument kosztowy (częściowa aktualizacja). /EN/: Partially update a cost document.

post.description: /PL/: Kategoryzacja AI dokumentu kosztowego — sugeruje MPK i kategorię. /EN/: AI categorization of a cost document — suggests MPK and category.
/PL/: Masowe zatwierdzanie dokumentów kosztowych. /EN/: Batch approve cost documents.
/PL/: Masowe odrzucanie dokumentów kosztowych. /EN/: Batch reject cost documents.
/PL/: Masowe oznaczanie dokumentów kosztowych jako opłacone. /EN/: Batch mark cost documents as paid.

name.description: Service name (Azure Key Vault, Microsoft Dataverse, KSeF API)

group.description: Group name (MPK, category, or supplier name)

invoices.description: List of invoices for the current page

total.description: Total number of invoices matching the filters

skipped.description: Number of invoices skipped (already exist in Dataverse)

newInvoiceIds.description: Dataverse IDs of newly created invoices

utilized.description: Total amount utilized in current period (PLN)

invoiceCount.description: Number of approved invoices in current period

recipientId.description: Dataverse system user ID of the recipient

ksefReferenceNumber.description: KSeF reference number (set after sending to KSeF)

agreementId.description: Either agreementId or supplierId must be provided

supplierId.description: Either agreementId or supplierId must be provided

importId.description: Import session ID (use in confirm endpoint)
